candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: When a system is taken from state a to state b along the path acb shown in the figure below, 70 J of heat flows into the system, and the system does 30 J of work. If the system does 10 J of work in transforming from state a to state b along path adb, does the system absorb or does it emit heat? How much heat is transferred?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 设系统从状态 A 沿路径 ACB 到达状态 B 时,吸收热量为 $Q_1=70\,\mathrm{J}$,做功为 $W_1=30\,\mathrm{J}$。若系统从状态 A 沿路径 ADB 到达状态 B 是可逆过程,求该过程吸收或放出的热量 $Q_2$。
metadata.explanation_zh: 利用从 $a$ 到 $b$ 所经过的路径与 $\Delta U_{a \rightarrow b}$ 无关这一事实,我们知道 $\Delta U_{adb} = +40\, \text{J}$,如前所计算。将 $\Delta U_{adb} = Q_{adb} + W_{adb}$,如果 $W_{adb} = -10\, \text{J}$,那么 $Q_{adb} = +50\, \text{J}$。因此,该系统吸收了 $50\, \text{J}$ 的热量。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The thermodynamics question is clear and solvable from the text alone; the diagram is helpful context but not actually required. The main issue is that the provided answer "50" gives the amount of heat only and omits the asked absorb/emit part.

field_audit_records.after_value: When a system is taken from state a to state b along the path acb shown in the figure below, 70J of heat flows into the system, and the system does 30J of work. If the system does 10J of work in transforming from state a to state b along path adb, does the system absorb or does it emit heat? How much heat is transferred?

rewrite_reports.rationale: The original question asks for two atomic outputs: whether heat is absorbed or emitted, and the amount of heat transferred. Splitting preserves the full semantics in open-ended form.
